NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-31-2023 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PATRICK WHALEY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND QUASH SERVICE, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. UNOPPOSED MOTION GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Quash Service
Off Calendar Jan-31-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ARIEL J. SABBAN, Esq. of ARC IP Law, PC (Tel: 858-729-0800) for defendant Patrick Whaley;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PATRICK WHALEY's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Quash Service.

Defense counsel does not contest the Court's tentative ruling, but makes mention of a written stipulation by the parties. The Court indicates that any written stipulation by the parties is not currently before the Court.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Patrick Whaley's unopposed "motion to set aside default and default judgment and quash service" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2016 Continued To Feb-22-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
